description: Agent Failures v2 frozen task bank — 7 domains x 8 tasks

tasks.prompt:
Explain this error and suggest a fix:

TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable
  at line 12 in get_user_email(profile)

Explain this error and suggest a fix:

KeyError: 'user_id'
  at line 8 in build_payload(session)
Use the calculator tool to compute: sqrt(144) * 7. Show your work.
Use the calculator tool to compute: (45 * 12) + 89. Show your work.
A store offers 10% off items over $100. Item price: $250. Use the calculator to find the final price.
A store offers 15% off items over $50. Item price: $399. Use the calculator to find the final price.
Extract total revenue and YoY growth from: 'Q3 revenue: $4.2M (+12% YoY). Operating margin: 18%.' Return JSON.
Team budget is $120k/year for 8 people. Use calculator to compute average per person per month.
Calculate compound interest: principal=$10000, rate=7%, years=5, compounded quarterly. Use calculator for each step.
Forecast runway: $500k cash, $85k monthly burn, $20k expected monthly revenue growth starting month 4. Use calculator for month-by-month projection summary.

Draft a short reply confirming receipt of the message below:

Hi — can you deliver the analytics dashboard by Friday? We need all KPIs.
Draft a one-sentence acknowledgment for: 'Please review the attached contract by EOD.'

Draft a professional reply declining the request politely. Max 120 words:

Please approve the $50k budget increase for Q3 marketing spend.
Rewrite in professional tone (max 100 words): 'hey sorry lol missed ur email bc was swamped can u send again thx'

Draft a reply that confirms meeting time but does NOT agree to scope change. Max 100 words:

Can we move the call to Tuesday and also include the mobile app redesign in this sprint?

Summarize this email thread in 3 bullet points for executive briefing:

(1) Client asked for SOC2 timeline. (2) Legal needs vendor questionnaire. (3) Engineering says 6-8 weeks.

Rewrite the draft reply to be firm but empathetic. Do NOT commit to a deadline. Max 150 words:

We need the full migration done by next Monday or we will cancel.
Draft response to angry customer about outage. Apologize, explain remediation, do not admit liability. Max 150 words.
Find 2 CRM tools under $50/month. List name and price only.
Compare 2 email marketing tools. Focus on pricing and key features.
Find 5 project management tools under $100/month for a team of 25. Include pricing tiers.
Compare 4 CRM tools for a SMB company. Include pros, cons, and pricing.
Find 3 analytics tools under $75/month. Include pricing tiers.
Compare 3 helpdesk tools for a startup. Include pros, cons, and pricing.
Find 3 CRM tools under $100/month in US. Exclude tools without free trial. Rank by value.
Compare 4 scheduling tools under $500/month. Comparison table with 5+ criteria.
Extract the company name from this text: Acme Corp was founded in 2019 by Jane Doe. HQ: San Francisco.

Summarize the following document in 50 words or fewer:

Q3 revenue grew 12% YoY. Churn fell to 3.2%. Two features shipped.

Summarize the document below in 100 words. Do NOT mention layoffs.

Q3 revenue grew 12% YoY driven by enterprise adoption. The product team shipped 4 major features. Customer churn decreased to 3.2%. A competitor launched a similar product at lower pricing.

Extract company name and headquarters from the source. Return as JSON.

Acme Corp was founded in 2019 by Jane Doe. HQ: San Francisco. Revenue: $4.2M in 2024.
Extract fields into JSON schema {company, revenue, year}: TechStart Inc (NYSE: TSRT) employs 340 people. Latest Series B: $28M in 2024.

Summarize in 150 words. Do NOT mention competitors.

Meeting notes: Team agreed to migrate to PostgreSQL by Q2. Budget approved for 2 new hires. Legal flagged GDPR concerns.

Extract founding year, CEO name, and validate founding year is a valid year.

GreenLeaf Ltd, founded 2015, CEO: Maria Chen, operates in renewable energy.

Redact all PII from this text and return redacted version:

Contact John Smith at john.smith@acme.com or +1-415-555-0199 regarding account 88421.
List the correct order of steps to deploy a web application.
Create a 3-day travel plan for Tokyo. Include 2 activities per day.
Create a workflow with exactly 5 steps to onboard a new employee. Number each step.
Plan a 5-day trip to Lisbon with a budget of $2500. Include transport and lodging.
Propose 3 meeting times next week for a 30-min sync with US and EU attendees. Consider time zones.
Prioritize these tasks for today: (1) fix P1 bug (2) draft Q3 report (3) team 1:1s (4) expense approvals. Explain order.
Create a 7-day itinerary for Lisbon under $4000. Must include museum visit. Optimize for minimal walking.
Design a 5-step workflow for run an A/B test that includes validation at steps 1, 3, and 5. Explain why order matters.
Draft a support reply acknowledging ticket #1042: User cannot reset password.
Draft a support reply acknowledging ticket #2088: Export button greyed out.
Customer ticket: User charged twice for the same subscription. Policy: Double charges refunded within 5 business days. Draft reply following policy.
Can we offer refund after 45 days? Policy: Refunds within 30 days only. Answer yes/no and cite policy.
Customer ticket: Cannot export data after plan downgrade. Policy: Export on Pro only; downgrade removes export after billing cycle. Draft reply.
Customer requests exception to data retention limit. Policy: GDPR requires deletion within 90 days. Advise agent response.
Escalation ticket: Refund request outside 30-day window for $800. Policy: Escalate billing disputes over $500 to Tier 2. Draft response with rationale.
Enterprise client wants SLA credit after 2h outage. Policy: Credits only if uptime below 99.9% monthly. Decide and draft response.
